paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 56 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 23 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 40 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 5 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 18. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **18 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** 7 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 6 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 4 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 10 payment tasks due this week.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 5 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 5 overdue payments — schedule work is fine but material delays will hit soon if these aren't processed. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 9 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

236 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **94 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 41 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 39 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 9. This needs to turn around today.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 6 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 16 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 5 overdue — oldest first. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 26 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 10. Keep the momentum going.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 10 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **18 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 53 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 4 overdue — oldest first. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **20 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 12. Keep the momentum going.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 18 overdue — oldest first. **17 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 7 overdue — oldest first. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 2 overdue — oldest first. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 10 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
